title: Kibble
description: Feed potion effects to animals via kibble!
body:
Kibble adds kibbles that can be brewed with potions and fed to your animals or pets to apply the potions effects to them.

 

Dry Kibble:

Crafted with four of any kind of vegetable or mushroom (Wheat, Carrot, Potato, Beetroot, Brown Mushroom and Red Mushroom). Does nothing on its own, though can be used as in the brewing stand input slot along with a potion as an ingredient to create Kibble.

Kibble:

Brewed from a potion and dry kibble in the brewing stand, can be fed to pets to apply potion effects.

Modded Support:

Any mod that adds its own potions should automatically be supported by this mod, and you will find their kibbles in the food and drinks tab.
